data.title: Lerøy Seafood Sets Date for Q4 2025 Results Presentation
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Leroy Seafood Group ASA ( (GB:0GM2) ) just unveiled an update.

Lerøy Seafood Group ASA will present its fourth-quarter 2025 results on 24 February 2026 at the Continental Hotel in Oslo, with the event starting at 08:00 CET and the quarterly report and presentation released earlier that morning. The results presentation will be conducted in Norwegian with a Q&A session, accessible both in person and via live webcast, and an English recording will be made available later the same day for international investors and other stakeholders.

By offering both a live Norwegian session and a recorded English version online, Lerøy aims to ensure broad accessibility and transparency around its financial performance and outlook. The structured release schedule and compliance with Norwegian securities disclosure rules underscore the company’s focus on investor relations and regulatory obligations, supporting informed decision-making among shareholders and market participants.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0GM2) stock is a Hold with a NOK46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Leroy Seafood Group ASA stock, see the GB:0GM2 Stock Forecast page.

More about Leroy Seafood Group ASA

Lerøy Seafood Group ASA is a Norwegian seafood company operating in the aquaculture and fisheries industry, with a primary focus on farming, processing, and distributing salmon, trout, and other seafood products to global markets. The company serves both retail and foodservice customers, positioning itself as a key player in the European and international seafood supply chain.

data.title: Terra Clean Energy Expands Wyoming Uranium Portfolio With 3,395 New Acres
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Tisdale Resources Corp ( (TSE:TCEC) ).

Terra Clean Energy Corp. has expanded its U.S. uranium footprint by adding 3,395 acres of new uranium exploration ground in Wyoming through low-cost staking of 100 unpatented BLM claims and the acquisition of three state leases. The properties, located along the south flank of the Washakie Basin near enCore Energy’s Juniper Ridge deposit, are fully owned by Terra and lie within the Miocene Browns Park Formation, a known host of sandstone roll-front uranium deposits.

Historical work on the newly covered ground identified uranium occurrences in limonite-altered fractured sandstone, with past sampling returning grades up to 0.375% U3O8, although limited exploration has occurred since the mid-1980s. The acquisition strengthens Terra’s growing uranium portfolio in a recognized uranium jurisdiction, positioning the company to potentially define new resources and enhance its presence in the U.S. uranium sector.

More about Tisdale Resources Corp

Terra Clean Energy Corp. is a Canadian-based uranium exploration and development company focused on projects in North America. Its key asset is the South Falcon East uranium project in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin, which hosts an inferred resource, alongside past-producing uranium mines in Utah and exploration properties in Wyoming, United States.

Average Trading Volume: 313,547

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$6.24M

data.title: &Do Holdings Marks Transition Year as It Shifts Focus to Real Estate Trading
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

&Do Holdings Co.Ltd. ( (JP:3457) ) has provided an update.

&Do Holdings Co., Ltd. is repositioning its business mix within the real estate industry, shifting emphasis from its house-leaseback operations toward real estate buying and selling while divesting its renovation segment. This transition aims to maintain profitability at levels comparable to the prior fiscal year despite temporary top-line and earnings pressure.

For the fiscal year ending June 2026, the company characterizes the period as a transition year, with first-half sales and profits falling short of targets due to delayed large projects and weaker margins on house-leaseback transfers to funds. Management expects performance to be second-half weighted, supported by the completed ¥1.5 billion transfer of the renovation business and ongoing reinforcement of personnel and property sourcing for the core real estate buying and selling business.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:3457) stock is a Hold with a Yen1111.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on &Do Holdings Co.Ltd. stock, see the JP:3457 Stock Forecast page.

More about &Do Holdings Co.Ltd.

&Do Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the real estate sector, focusing on house leaseback services and the buying and selling of real estate. The company has also been involved in a renovation business, which it is in the process of transferring as it rebalances its portfolio toward property trading activities.

data.title: Yamatane to Grant 110,000 Restricted Shares to Employees as Part of New Remuneration Plan
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Yamatane Corporation ( (JP:9305) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Yamatane Corporation has approved the disposal of 110,000 treasury shares as restricted stock remuneration for 1,100 employees of the company and its subsidiaries, with a disposal price of 2,307 yen per share and a total value of 253.77 million yen. The program, covering the fiscal year from April 1, 2026 to March 31, 2027, is designed to align employee interests with shareholders by linking long‑term stock price performance and corporate value.

Under the restricted stock plan, employees will receive shares in exchange for monetary remuneration claims and will be subject to transfer restrictions that last until they retire from the group. Shares may be acquired by the company without compensation if employees leave early or fail to meet conditions, while restrictions can be lifted in full or in part if service conditions are met or in certain reorganization scenarios, reinforcing retention and long‑term engagement.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9305) stock is a Hold with a Yen2404.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Yamatane Corporation stock, see the JP:9305 Stock Forecast page.

More about Yamatane Corporation

Yamatane Corporation, listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 9305, operates in the logistics and related services sector. The company manages group operations through its subsidiaries and employs a large workforce in Japan, reflecting its established presence in domestic logistics and associated administrative services.

Oriental Shiraishi Corporation ( (JP:1786) ) has provided an update.

Oriental Shiraishi Corporation has issued a correction to its recent announcement on the change in representative director, revising the career history of newly appointed Representative Director and President, Mitsuru Terui. The update clarifies that Terui became Managing Executive Officer and General Manager of the Corporate Planning Department in April 2025, and then assumed the position of Director and Managing Executive Officer, General Manager of the Corporate Planning Department in June 2025, aligning his official record with his current responsibilities and ensuring accurate disclosure for stakeholders.

The correction does not alter the substance of the leadership change itself but refines the timeline of Terui’s progression through senior management roles within the group. By rectifying the executive’s career summary, the company aims to strengthen transparency around its governance structure, giving investors and business partners a clearer view of the experience and roles of its new top executive.

data.title: Benz Mining to Launch 250,000m Drill Campaign at Recast Glenburgh Gold District
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Benz Mining ( (TSE:BZ) ) is now available.

Benz Mining Corp is ramping up work at its Glenburgh Gold Project in Western Australia, where recent geological mapping has reinterpreted the area as a coherent district-scale gold system comprising three major camps: Hurricane, Icon and the newly defined Thunderbolt. With A$94 million in pro forma cash on hand following a recent equity raise, the company is positioned to fund intensive exploration and resource-definition drilling through 2026.

The company plans more than 250,000 metres of drilling next year across all three camp areas, aiming to grow high-grade resources at Hurricane, test bulk-tonnage open-pit potential along the >3km Icon trend to depths of 300–500 metres and carry out first-pass deep drilling at Thunderbolt, which has seen only shallow historical work. Benz will also roll out regional soil and gravity surveys over an 80km trend, with management highlighting Thunderbolt as a major new growth front that could materially expand Glenburgh’s scale and reinforce the project’s status as a significant, multi-camp gold district.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BZ) stock is a Hold with a C$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Benz Mining stock, see the TSE:BZ Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BZ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and continued cash burn), with only partial support from a low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals are favorable with strong upside trend and positive MACD, but overbought signals raise short-term risk. Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:BZ stock, click here.

Benz Mining Corp is a gold exploration company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and ASX, focused on advancing the Glenburgh Gold Project in Western Australia. The company targets high-grade and bulk-tonnage gold systems across a district-scale tenure, leveraging extensive historical work and an advanced permitting position to fast-track resource growth and project studies.

data.title: Nagase & Co. Lifts Nine-Month Profit and Ups Dividend as Portfolio Reshaping Continues
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nagase & Co ( (JP:8012) ) has shared an update.

Nagase & Co. reported nine-month net sales to December 31, 2025 of ¥724.1 billion, up slightly year on year, with gross profit rising 5.9% and operating income up 7.1%. Profit attributable to owners of the parent climbed 15.0% to ¥25.0 billion, boosting earnings per share to ¥236.02, while total assets reached ¥860.5 billion and equity capital expanded, although the shareholders’ equity ratio edged down.

The company revised its annual dividend forecast upward to ¥100 per share, signaling confidence in earnings sustainability, and maintained its full-year profit outlook, which implies double-digit growth in bottom-line income. Nagase also continued to reshape its portfolio with eight new consolidated subsidiaries and three exclusions, alongside internal mergers and accounting changes, underscoring ongoing structural optimization and international expansion that may support longer-term profitability.

More about Nagase & Co

Nagase & Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based trading and manufacturing company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, operating under Japanese GAAP. It focuses on chemicals and advanced materials, life sciences, electronics, and related solutions, leveraging a global network of subsidiaries to supply specialized products and services to industrial and technology customers worldwide.

data.title: Aozora Bank Reports Stable Basel III Capital Ratios at Year-End 2025
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aozora Bank ( (JP:8304) ) has shared an update.

Aozora Bank reported a consolidated capital adequacy ratio of 10.47% and a Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) ratio of 9.1% as of December 31, 2025, under Japan’s domestic implementation of Basel III. The non-consolidated capital adequacy ratio stood at 9.93%, with both consolidated and non-consolidated ratios broadly stable versus prior periods, indicating the bank continues to operate with a capital buffer comfortably above the 4% minimum required.

Regulatory capital on a consolidated basis was ¥490.2 billion against risk-weighted assets of ¥4.68 trillion, while on a non-consolidated basis regulatory capital totaled ¥456.97 billion against ¥4.60 trillion in risk-weighted assets. The largely steady capital metrics suggest that Aozora Bank’s balance sheet remains resilient, providing reassurance to creditors and shareholders about its ability to absorb risk and comply with Financial Services Agency capital standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8304) stock is a Hold with a Yen2802.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aozora Bank stock, see the JP:8304 Stock Forecast page.

More about Aozora Bank

Aozora Bank, Ltd. is a Japanese commercial bank listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, focusing on a range of corporate and retail banking services. Operating under domestic regulatory standards, it manages its capital position in line with Basel III requirements to maintain financial soundness and support lending and other banking operations in Japan.

data.title: Scorpio Gold Sells Nevada Mill to Fund Modern Core Facility and Exploration Push
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Scorpio Gold ( (TSE:SGN) ) has shared an update.

Scorpio Gold is realigning infrastructure at its Manhattan District project in Nevada by converting an existing concrete metal structure into a modern, centralized core processing, logging and storage facility to support an expanded drilling and exploration program. The upgraded facility is designed to handle higher drill volumes, improve geological modeling, and enhance core management, positioning the company to accelerate resource growth across what it views as a district-scale gold system.

To fund and create space for this initiative, Scorpio’s subsidiary Goldwedge LLC has agreed to sell its idle Manhattan mineral processing plant and associated infrastructure to Manhattan Metals Corp. for C$750,000, reallocating capital from a small, outdated mill toward exploration-focused infrastructure. The company has also engaged Mining Stock Education LLC to strengthen investor communications and marketing, signaling a broader push to raise its profile as it ramps up exploration activities.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SGN) stock is a Hold with a C$0.37 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Scorpio Gold stock, see the TSE:SGN Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Sekisui Chemical Reshapes Top Management to Bolster Growth Strategy
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sekisui Chemical Co ( (JP:4204) ) has shared an announcement.

Sekisui Chemical Co., Ltd. has announced a leadership reshuffle aimed at strengthening its management structure to support further growth and reinforce its revenue base. Effective March 1, 2026, Representative Director Ikusuke Shimizu will be promoted to President and Representative Director and CEO, while current President and Representative Director Keita Kato will become Chairman of the Board and Director.

In addition, Tatsuya Nishida is slated to become a Representative Director on June 19, 2026, subject to approval at the company’s 104th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders and a subsequent board vote. The appointments, which draw on Shimizu’s extensive experience in the High Performance Plastics business and corporate strategy, are intended to enhance governance and operational leadership as Sekisui Chemical pursues its long-term growth agenda.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4204) stock is a Buy with a Yen3020.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sekisui Chemical Co stock, see the JP:4204 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sekisui Chemical Co

Sekisui Chemical Co., Ltd. is a diversified Japanese chemical manufacturer with businesses spanning high-performance plastics, housing, and related materials and solutions. The company focuses on advanced materials, infrastructure and environmental products, and lifestyle-related offerings, serving industrial and consumer markets in Japan and overseas.
